question_title: Will BKNG's market close price on 2026-04-10 be higher than its market close price on 2026-04-01?
summary: BKNG stock direction over 7 trading days (April 1-10, 2026) is near a coin flip with a slight negative tilt. BKNG is in a deep drawdown (-28% from 52-week high), but the macro environment is bearish (Iran war, oil spike, S&P 500 down ~7% YTD, recession probability near 50%). A 25-for-1 stock split becomes effective April 2 (split-adjusted trading April 6), which could provide a mild positive catalyst. Monte Carlo simulations across four scenarios (recent negative drift, zero drift, conditional drawdown recovery, fat-tailed) produce 47-54% probability of being higher, averaging ~49%. The historical conditional base rate for BKNG in a 25%+ drawdown is 50.9% positive over 7 days. The slight downward adjustment to 47% reflects the persistent negative recent drift and adverse macro conditions.

factors.description: BKNG in deep drawdown (-28% from 52w high) - conditional 7-day forward return is 50.9% positive historically (212 events), essentially a coin flip
Recent negative trend: 20-day trailing mean return -0.07%/day, 20-day return -1.4%, suggesting continued downward pressure
Bearish macro environment: Iran war, oil spike, S&P down ~7% YTD, Moody's recession model at 49%, JPMorgan cut S&P target
Stock split (25-for-1) effective April 2, split-adjusted trading April 6 - mild positive catalyst from retail accessibility
S&P 500 conditional returns when down >=5% from 52w high: 56% positive over 7 days (1535 events) - broader market slightly favors recovery
Monte Carlo simulations across 4 scenarios (negative drift, zero drift, conditional, fat-tailed) average ~49% probability of being higher
High daily volatility (2.59%) means 7-day outcomes are highly uncertain - fundamentally close to a coin flip

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.47 (47% probability BKNG closes higher on April 10 than April 1)**

Key findings:
- **Near coin-flip**: Short-term stock direction over 7 trading days is inherently close to 50/50, confirmed by both Monte Carlo simulations (47-54% across scenarios) and the historical conditional base rate (50.9% when BKNG is in 25%+ drawdown)
- **Slight negative tilt**: The recent negative drift (-0.07%/day over 20 days) and bearish macro environment (Iran war, oil shock, recession fears at 49%, S&P 500 down 7% YTD) push the probability slightly below 50%
- **Stock split consideration**: The 25-for-1 split effective April 2 (trading April 6) could provide a mild positive catalyst but not enough to offset macro headwinds
- **High volatility**: 2.59% daily vol means large swings are possible in either direction, but the distribution center sits just below the starting price
sources_consulted: [Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/BKNG/)

[Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) Stock Historical Prices & Data - Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/BKNG/history/)
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the latest market close price of BKNG. If it is higher than the close price on 2026-04-01, the question will resolve to 'Yes'. The close price will be pulled from the Yahoo Finance API.
fine_print: Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
